<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Enforce configured string constraints. Strider default: no constraints.

## Bad

```go
const identifier = "ABC 123" // violating the configured format
```

## Good

```go
const identifier = "abc-123" // matching the configured format
```
